steps.title: Define what the blank must mean
steps.content: The passage says the pro-innovation bias is a "dominant view" requiring a "necessary corrective," meaning it is present throughout the field of technology history studies — not just in some of them. The blank must mean something like "is widespread throughout" or "runs through."

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the match
steps.content:
Work through each option:
  • Choice A — 'supersedes': means replaces or takes precedence over. The bias doesn't replace the studies; it runs through them. ✗
  • Choice B — 'pervades': means spreads throughout and is present everywhere in something. The bias pervades technology history studies — consistent with it being the "dominant view." ✓
  • Choice C — 'abridges': means shortens or condenses. A bias does not shorten studies. ✗
  • Choice D — 'foments': means stirs up or incites unrest. The bias doesn't provoke or incite the studies into existence; it permeates existing ones. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
